summary: This cluster focuses on the taxonomic revision of red algal genera within the family Delesseriaceae, specifically *Cumathamnion*, *Delesseria*, *Membranoptera*, and *Pantoneura*, using molecular data to resolve evolutionary relationships. Key findings include the transfer of *Delesseria decipiens* and *D. serrulata* into *Cumathamnion*, resulting in the proposed name *C. platyphylla*, which highlights a close genetic relationship between North Pacific species. The research integrates molecular markers with morphological characteristics to revise existing taxonomic frameworks, with a geographic scope spanning the North Atlantic, Baltic Sea, and North Pacific regions.
